title: Nearly 100 Migrant Workers Escape Namakkal Textile Factory
summary: Approximately 100 workers from Jharkhand fled a textile factory alleging regular beatings, confinement, and non-payment of wages.

title: Escaped Workers Allege Beatings and Unlawful Confinement
summary: Migrant workers reported being slapped, locked inside, and threatened not to leave. Jharkhand CM Soren intervened after reports surfaced.

title: Madras High Court Orders Education Loan Disbursement for MBBS Student
summary: Court ordered Tamil Nadu government to disburse ₹30 lakh education loan to a Namakkal MBBS student studying in the Philippines.

title: AIADMK Internal Conflict: Former MLA Protests Against Party Leadership
summary: Former MLA K.P.P. Baskar staged protest against ex-Minister P. Thangamani over denial of party ticket for election.

title: Namakkal District Records Over 90% Voter Turnout
summary: Namakkal district exceeded 90% polling percentage, demonstrating strong democratic participation across all constituencies.

title: Moderate to Heavy Rain Forecast for April 30 to May 2
summary: IMD predicts moderate to heavy rainfall in Namakkal from April 30 to May 2, bringing relief from ongoing heatwave.

title: EVMs Secured in Strong Rooms with Multi-Layer Guard Deployment
summary: Election Commission implemented stringent security with electronic voting machines placed in strong rooms under round-the-clock armed guards.
